info.name: Masala Dosa
info.description: Serves 1 | Tawa- toasted, crispy and delicious dosa, folded in with masala.

info.name: Rava Idli
info.description: Steamed semolina cakes made with a mix of yoghurt, coriander, cashew nuts, curry leaves and mustard seeds. Invented by MTR during World War II, when rice was in short supply, the Rava Idli remains our most popular dish to date (Serves 1)

info.name: Vada (1)
info.description: Serves 1 | A deliciously hearty combo with 1 irresistibly crispy vada served with sambar and chutney.

info.name: Onion Dosa
info.description: Crispy and delicious dosa topped with onions.

info.name: Neer Dosa
info.description: Dosa made from rice flour, served with jaggery mixed with freshly ground coconut and coconut chutney.

info.name: Pudi Dosa
info.description: Dosa made from rice & black gram, topped with chutney powder and spiced potatoes

info.name: Ragi Dosa
info.description: Serves 1 | Super-healthy dosa made with ragi batter - a new and healthy breakfast companion!

info.name: Chow Chow Bhath
info.description: Serves 1 | A wholesome meal comprising of a savoury rava bhath, a sweet kesari bath, and coonut chutney.

info.name: Bisibele Bhath
info.description: A rice dish made of lentils, assorted vegetables, nutmeg, cashews, curry leaves and tamarind pulp. Served with raitha made from curds and onions.(Serves -1)

info.name: Mangalore Buns
info.description: Soft, fluffy, mildly sweet buns made using bananas and flour.

info.name: Puliyogare

info.name: Fruit Mixture (with Ice cream)
info.description: A delectable mixture of fresh fruits, complimented with a scoop of our trademark American ice cream.

info.name: Raw Pressery Coconut Water 200ml
info.description: Every athletes go to natural energy drink; coconut water is a complete win-win for your everyday rehydration needs. #iaminlovewiththecoco!
